title: Rotarod test
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4bequ","text":"Motor learning was assessed with an accelerating rotarod. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: The task was done using a rotarod apparatus (Panlab) equipped with a mouse rod (3 cm diameter) and set to 4–40 rpm acceleration over 300 seconds.
The task consisted of daily sessions (five trials per session; intertrial-interval = 15 s, max trial duration = 300 s)
Mice were placed on the accelerating rotarod. The time of mouse fell from the rod was recorded. The mean of 5 trials is used for the final analysis
creator: Chuyu Chen
